prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次为约9836名→10058名→8766名→22608名→11788名。2024年因贵州省首年实施新高考（文理分科改为物理类/历史类）， 位次出现异常大幅后移至22608名，2025年迅速回弹至11788名，近两年波动剧烈。2025年基准位次约11788名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划2021年98人、2022 年106人、2023年108人、2024年116人、2025年118人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。2026年计划大幅增至156人，较2025年扩招约32%，扩招幅度为近五年最大，对位次有显著后移 压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65区间，学校层次稳固；该校在声誉舆 情文件中未出现明显负面或正面事件，整体声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第52位（较热），短视频曝光量中等，报考关注度一般；未见历史投档断档记录；水利工程 为A+（全国顶尖），土木工程为A，环境科学与工程为A，均为该校王牌学科，对水利、土木、环境等相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电气、水利等 工科专业社会热度持续偏高；贵州省2026年普通高考考生总数约29.9万人，较2025年（约29.7万人）略有增加；按近年物理类占比约69.7%估算，2026年物理类考生约20.8万人， 较2025年（20.7万人）微增，竞争略有加剧。；河海大学位于江苏省南京市，地 处长三角核心区域，对西南地区考生有较强的地域吸引力；该校在贵州省招生占比约1.5%–2%，属跨省招生中游水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11788名、2026年大幅 扩招约32%（位次后移主因）、考生总数微增及学校声誉平稳等因素。考虑到扩招幅度较大但学校层次和优势学科对位次有一定支撑，以及2024年新高 考改革后位次已趋于稳定，预测2026年物理类最低位次约14035名，较2025年后移约2247名。位次区间13535–14535名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 9836 → 10058 → 8766 → 22608 → 11788. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao in Guizhou (changing from arts/science division to Physics/History categories), the ranking abnormally shifted back to 22608, then quickly rebounded to 11788 in 2025, showing significant volatility in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11788. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou was 98 in 2021, 106 in 2022, 108 in 2023, 116 in 2024, and 118 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 156, an expansion of about 32% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in the past five years, exerting notable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 63rd, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, indicating a solid university level. In reputation and public opinion files, no significant negative or positive events were found, maintaining overall stable reputation. Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure and general application attention. No historical record of enrollment gaps. Water Resources Engineering is A+ (top in China), Civil Engineering is A, Environmental Science and Engineering is A, all being flagship disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to water resources, civil engineering, environment, and related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Water Resources continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular Gaokao examinees in Guizhou is approximately 299,000, slightly increased from about 297,000 in 2025. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 69.7%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 208,000, slightly up from 207,000 in 2025, indicating a slight intensification of competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, exerting strong regional attraction for candidates from the southwestern region. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5%–2%, at a mid-level among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11788, the significant expansion of about 32% in 2026 (main factor for ranking shift), slight increase in total examinees, and stable university reputation. Given the large expansion but the support from university level and advantageous disciplines, and the stabilization of rankings after the 2024 new Gaokao reform, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 14035, shifting back by about 2247 compared to 2025. The ranking range is 13535–14535.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 14035, range 13535–14535. Candidates with rankings at the lower bound (13535) or below can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Dayu class, Computer Science). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 14000) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates near the upper bound (14535) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as safety, while also attempting Tier 2 majors with lower rankings. Hohai University's Water Resources Engineering A+ discipline is outstanding, with good employment prospects for related majors, deserving special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1625 → 1814 → 1671 → 3040 → 2494. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform in Guizhou Province, the ranking significantly dropped to 3040, rebounding to 2494 in 2025, with considerable fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2494. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 14 students from 2021 to 2023, 15 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. The plan for 2026 is reduced to 11 students, a decrease of about 15.4% compared to 2025, the lowest in the past five years. The reduction in enrollment puts upward pressure on rankings (slightly eased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 63rd, with stable rankings in recent years and a solid university level. Its reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion. It ranks 52nd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with average application attention. No historical admission gaps have been recorded. Hohai University is primarily engineering-focused, and its History Category majors (Accounting, Law, English, Sociology, etc.) have low correlation with the university's A-level disciplines (Water Resources Engineering A+, Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A), but the 211 platform still holds strong appeal for liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular liberal arts majors such as Accounting and Law remain highly sought after. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000. Based on the recent proportion of History Category candidates at about 30.3%, it is estimated that there will be about 90,600 History Category candidates in 2026, a slight increase from 90,100 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from the southwestern region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 2494 in 2025, the planned enrollment reduction of about 15.4% in 2026 (main factor for ranking advancement), a slight increase in total candidates, and stable university reputation. Given the significant reduction in enrollment but the low correlation between liberal arts majors and the university's flagship disciplines, and the trend of ranking fluctuations converging after the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2279, advancing about 215 places compared to 2025. The ranking range is 1869–2689.

Hohai University's 211 platform offers good value for liberal arts candidates, and majors like Accounting and Law have promising employment prospects.
